name: Fiesta Pasta Salad Fat Free
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces pasta rotelle -- cooked, drain, cool
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine pasta, onion, red pepper, corn, chilies, jalapenos, and cilantro or parsley.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the salad dressing, chili powder, and cumin.
3. Pour the mixture over the pasta ingredients and toss to coat well.
4. Chill at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to blend before serving.
